# cloudbolt_resource_jobs_ref (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve job information for a CloudBolt Resource by ID or API URL path.

## Example Usage
```hcl
data "cloudbolt_resource_jobs_ref" "resource_jobs" {
    url_path = "/api/v3/cmp/resources/RSC-no9aztne/"
}

data "cloudbolt_resource_jobs_ref" "resource_jobs_id" {
    id = "RSC-no9aztne"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Argument Reference

### Optional

- `id` (String) The global id of a CloudBolt Resource, required if "url_path" is not provided
- `url_path` (String) The relative API URL path for the CloudBolt Resource, required if "id" is not provided

### Read-Only

- `job_info` (List of Object) Job information for the CloudBolt Resource. Each object contains:
  - `title` (String) Job title
  - `start_date` (String) Date and time the job started
  - `end_date` (String) Date and time the job ended
  - `status` (String) Job status
  - `output` (String) Job output
  - `error` (String) Job error message, if any
  - `progress_messages` (List of String) Progress messages emitted during job execution
